The fluffy socks are made of high-quality fabric, which are elastic and can fit your feet perfectly. Each pair of slipper socks have anti-skid grips. In addition, these socks are thickened to keep your feet warm in cold winter. Previous page There are different colors of fluffy slipper socks, you can match them with all kinds of clothes you like! Learn More Next page Anti-skid Grips Designed with grippy rubber treads to help reduce slips and falls. These slipper socks allow you to walk safely. Premium Fabric Made of 98% polyester and 2% elastane, these socks are soft and fluffy, keep you in the most comfortable state. Thickening Design Thicker and warmer than ordinary socks, these fluffy socks are very suitable at home, keep your feet warm in cold winter. Elastic Cuffs The sock cuff is designed with close elastic fiber, which can not only prevent socks from falling off, but also effectively protect women's leg. Best Gifts Material: 98% polyester, 2% elastane Features: Non-slip, Thick These thick fluffy socks can keep your feet warm when you are playing, studying, working and resting, they are perfect ideas as gifts for Christmas, birthday and Thanksgiving to your friends and families. Note: The socks will shed some fluffy bits that is normal phenomenon for the fluffy socks!
